tuning: E A D G B E
content:
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
      For easier chords, Capo 6th fret and transpose this tab -4 (use transpose function at bottom)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- Shown below for Capo 2nd fret 
- Live performances use chords shapes shown below but with no capo (https://youtu.be/vLYqgBojlIM?t=178)
- For acoustic version, go here: https://tabs.ultimate-guitar.com/tab/ed_sheeran/i_dont_care_chords_2711352

[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]                           [ch]C#m[/ch]                         [ch]A[/ch]                           [ch]B[/ch]
e|-----0--0--x---0--0--|    e|---------------------|    e|---------------------|    e|---------------------|
B|-----0--0--x---0--0--|    B|-----5--5--x---5--5--|    B|-----5--5--x---5--5--|    B|-----7--7--x---7--7--|
G|-----1--1--x---1--1--|x8  G|-----6--6--x---6--6--|x4  G|-----6--6--x---6--6--|x2  G|-----8--8--x---8--8--|x2
D|-----2--2--x---2--2--|    D|-----6--6--x---6--6--|    D|-----7--7--x---7--7--|    D|-----9--9--x---9--9--|
A|-----2--2--x---2--2--|    A|--4------------------|    A|-----7--7--x---7--7--|    A|-----9--9--x---9--9--|
E|--0------------------|    E|---------------------|    E|--5------------------|    E|--7------------------|
x = mute string[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
  I'm at a party I don't wanna be at[/tab]
[tab]                                      [ch]C#m[/ch]
And I don't ever wear a suit and tie, yeah[/tab]
            
Wonderin' if I could sneak out the back
[tab]                               [ch]A[/ch]
Nobody's even lookin' me in my eyes[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]B[/ch]                                            
Then you take my hand, finish my drink, say, "shall we dance?"[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]E[/ch]
Hell yeah, you know I love ya, did I ever tell ya?[/tab]

You make it better like that


[Pre-Chorus 1]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
  Don't think I fit in at this party[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]
     Everyone's got so much to say, yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                          [ch]B[/ch]
  I always feel like I'm nobody, mmm[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
  Who wants to fit in anyway?[/tab]


[Chorus 1]
[tab]               [ch]E[/ch]
'Cause I don't care when I'm with my baby, yeah[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]C#m[/ch]
All the bad things disappear[/tab]
                              
And you're makin' me feel like maybe I am somebody
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                          [ch]B[/ch]
  I can deal with the bad nights[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]E[/ch]
  When I'm with my baby, yeah, ooh ooh-ooh ooh oooh ooh[/tab]

[tab]               [ch]E[/ch]
'Cause I don't care as long as you just hold me near[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]C#m[/ch]
You can take me anywhere[/tab]

And you're makin' me feel like I'm loved by somebody
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                          [ch]B[/ch]
  I can deal with the bad nights[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]E[/ch]
  When I'm with my baby, yeah, ooh ooh-ooh ooh oooh ooh[/tab]


[Verse 2]
N.C.
     We at a party we don't wanna be at
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                                 [ch]C#m[/ch]
  Tryna talk but we can't hear ourselves[/tab]
                          
Read your lips, I'd rather kiss 'em right back
[tab]                                      [ch]A[/ch]
With all these people all around, I'm crippled with anxiety[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]B[/ch]
But I'm told, it's where we're s'posed to be[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]
You know what, it's kinda crazy 'cause I really don't mind[/tab]

And you make it better like that


[Pre-Chorus 2]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
  Don't think we fit in at this party[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]
     Everyone's got so much to say, oh yeah yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                               [ch]B[/ch]
  When we walked in, I said I'm sorry, mmm-mm[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                                N.C.
  But now I think that we should stay[/tab]


[Chorus 2]
[tab]               [ch]E[/ch]
'Cause I don't care when I'm with my baby, yeah[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]C#m[/ch] 
All the bad things disappear[/tab]
                              
And you're makin' me feel like maybe I am somebody
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                          [ch]B[/ch]
  I can deal with the bad nights[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]E[/ch]
  When I'm with my baby, yeah, ooh ooh-ooh ooh oooh ooh[/tab]

(oh yeah, yeah, yeah)

[tab]               [ch]E[/ch]
'Cause I don't care as long as you just hold me near[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]C#m[/ch]
You can take me anywhere[/tab]

And you're makin' me feel like I'm loved by somebody
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                          [ch]B[/ch]
  I can deal with the bad nights[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]E[/ch]
  When I'm with my baby, yeah, ooh ooh-ooh ooh oooh ooh (no)[/tab]


[Bridge]
N.C.
  I don't like nobody but it's, like you're the only one here
N.C.
  I don't like nobody but you, baby, I don't care
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
  I don't like nobody but you, I hate everyone here[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                         N.C.
  I don't like nobody but you, baby, yeah[/tab]


[Chorus 3]
[tab]               [ch]E[/ch]
'Cause I don't care (don't care) when I'm with my baby, yeah (oh yeah)[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]C#m[/ch] 
All the bad things disappear (disappear)[/tab]
                              
And you're makin' me feel like maybe I am somebody (maybe I'm somebody)
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                          [ch]B[/ch]
  I can deal with the bad nights (with the bad nights)[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]E[/ch]
  When I'm with my baby, yeah, ooh ooh-ooh ooh oooh ooh[/tab]

[tab](ooh-ooh ooh-ooh yeah-yeah-yeah)[/tab]

[tab]               [ch]E[/ch]
'Cause I don't care as long as you just hold me near (me near)[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]C#m[/ch]
You can take me anywhere (anywhere)[/tab]

And you're makin' me feel like I'm loved by somebody (I'm loved by somebody)
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                          [ch]B[/ch]
  I can deal with the bad nights[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]E[/ch]
  When I'm with my baby, yeah, ooh ooh-ooh ooh oooh ooh[/tab]
